{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
Stigmem nodes configured with authentication disabled could grant the anonymous identity broad read/write/federation capabilities if exposed outside a loopback-only local development environment. Impacted users are operators who intentionally disabled authentication while binding the node to a non-loopback URL.

### Patches
Patched in 0.9.0a2. The node now refuses unauthenticated operation outside loopback-only local development.

### Workarounds
Before upgrading, keep authentication enabled for all non-local deployments and do not expose nodes with authentication disabled to untrusted networks.

### Upgrade
Upgrade to the patched release:

```bash
pip install --upgrade --pre stigmem-node
```

If developers install through the Stigmem meta-package instead, they should use the matching extra for their deployments, for example:

```bash
pip install --upgrade --pre 'stigmem[node]'
```

### Resources
- Release: https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/releases/tag/v0.9.0a2
- Changelog: https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/blob/v0.9.0a2/CHANGELOG.md#L14-L35
- Security policy and posture: https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/blob/v0.9.0a2/SECURITY.md", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T22:13:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-29T22:13:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/security/advisories/GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5", "https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/blob/v0.9.0a2/CHANGELOG.md#L14-L35", "https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/blob/v0.9.0a2/SECURITY.md", "https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem/releases/tag/v0.9.0a2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/eidetic-labs/stigmem/security-advisories/GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/eidetic-labs/stigmem", "summary": "stigmem-node: Auth-disabled deployments may grant broad anonymous access outside loopback", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T22:13:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fp6w-8wpg-74g5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.9.0a2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "stigmem-node"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.9.0a2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: stigmem-node: Auth-disabled deployments may grant broad anonymous access outside loopback
